description: Letter from Moshe b. Shemuel Ibn Jamia from Gabes/Qabis (Ifriqiya) to Yosef b. Ya’aqov b. Awkal, Fustat. Around 1030. The letter deals with shipments of money and questions from Cabes to Hayya Gaon, and mentions answers that he wrote back. Ibn Awkal is in charge of the shipments as well as Shemuel b. Barhun al-Tāhartī. Shemuel traveled from Qayrawan to Fustat through Gabes. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #142) VMR
description_he: מכתב ממשה בן שמואל אבן ג'אמיע, מגאבס, ליוסף בן יעקב בן אוקאל, פוסטאט, כ-1030, על משלוחי כסף ותשובות מהאי גאון
